members.name: plugin-hardener
members.role: Generalist implementer for plugin entry, init, and event hooks

members.name: hook-hardener
members.role: Generalist implementer for permission and activity-tracker hooks

members.name: tool-hardener

members.name: reviewer
members.role: Reviews completed work before commit. Reads diffs, runs build + tests, spots regressions, edge cases, missing tests, and shipping-blocker bugs. Never approves silently — always reports concrete findings.
